tasks.subject: Task 0: Schema v3 migration (claim + calibration + stale_flagged_at)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend schema + versioned-migration framework to v3 with claim/calibration tables and spec.stale_flagged_at, idempotently.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/schema.sql", "mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/migrations.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_migrations.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_migrations.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fresh init_db is user_version 3 with claim+calibration tables and spec.stale_flagged_at", "v2 DB upgrades to v3 without data loss", "double apply_migrations is a no-op"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: claims.py (claim_scope, release_claim, detect_overlap)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Record per-task scope claims, detect overlap vs held claims, compute max non-overlapping batch (serial-when-shared core). Glob-aware.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/claims.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_claims.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_claims.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["claim_scope inserts held claim, release_claim flips to released", "claim_scope raises ClaimConflict on overlap", "detect_overlap returns largest disjoint subset deterministically", "glob-aware overlap"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: weeding.py (flag_stale + stale-spec detection)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface nodes untouched beyond threshold and dispatched Specs with no progress; stamp/clear spec.stale_flagged_at. Surface only.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/weeding.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_weeding.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_weeding.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["find_stale_nodes returns old non-terminal nodes, excludes fresh", "flag_stale_specs stamps stale and clears recovered", "fresh node/spec never flagged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: calibration.py (record_outcome, get_calibration, adjust_trust)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Track per-role hit/miss, Laplace-smoothed score, flip distrusted at floor 0.4 / ceiling 0.7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/calibration.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_calibration.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_calibration.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["record_outcome upserts and updates smoothed score", "get_calibration returns row or neutral default", "adjust_trust sets distrusted below floor, clears above ceiling, adjusted True only on change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Register 7 Phase 2 MCP tools in server.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose claim_scope, release_claim, detect_overlap, flag_stale, record_outcome, get_calibration, adjust_trust (25 total). ClaimConflict via _err.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/server.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_server.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_server.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["list_tools includes all 7 new tools, total 25", "call_tool dispatches each, ClaimConflict via _err not crash"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Promote llm_harness.py to package + Pool wrapper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move tests/llm_harness.py -> src/agentic_mcp/headless.py (re-export shim) and add Pool(max_workers).run(jobs, launch_fn) with cap+backfill.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/headless.py", "mcp-server/tests/llm_harness.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_headless.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_headless.py tests/test_llm_harness.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all harness fns importable from agentic_mcp.headless", "tests/llm_harness.py re-exports so phase1 e2e passes", "Pool caps concurrency at N, backfills, one result per job"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: scheduler.py (ready-set + DAG merge order)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure functions ready_tasks (parent Spec dispatched via 'implements', 'depends-on' deps resolved) and merge_order (topological, cycle->ValueError). Use relations.neighbors. relations table is 'relations'; valid types implements/depends-on (NOT belongs-to/blocked-by).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/scheduler.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_scheduler.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_scheduler.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ready_tasks honors implements + depends-on resolution", "merge_order topological, raises on cycle", "task with unresolved depends-on excluded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Orchestrator command + agent docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Author commands/orchestrate.md (single-tick --once/--pool/--weed-days) and agents/orchestrator.md (model: sonnet, implements nothing).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["commands/orchestrate.md", "agents/orchestrator.md", "mcp-server/tests/test_agent_docs.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_agent_docs.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["orchestrator.md frontmatter matches siblings, model: sonnet, implements-nothing + tool refs", "orchestrate.md documents single-tick contract + defaults", "test_agent_docs passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7.5: Orchestrator tick entry point (orchestrate.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Compose Phase 2 components into one stateless seam-injectable tick() + `python -m agentic_mcp.orchestrate --once` CLI. Deterministically testable with stubbed seams. See plan Task 7.5 for the full contract.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tick() with stubbed seams runs full pipeline deterministically", "two disjoint tasks both dispatched+merged", "overlapping: only one dispatched", "ok=False leaves failed/in_progress/claim held", "low-hit review drives adjust_trust", "merge order respects depends-on", "CLI --once prints JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Phase 2 LLM e2e exit-gate test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** llm-marked e2e: two orthogonal Specs build parallel into separate worktrees and merge without collision; weeding surfaces stale node; scripted reviewer miss drives adjust_trust to fire. Deselected by default.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/tests/test_phase2_e2e.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m llm tests/test_phase2_e2e.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["marked llm + skipif claude not on path", "two disjoint specs build parallel + merge no conflict + criteria satisfied", "weeding surfaces stale node", "calibration adjustment fires + honored", "deselected under -m 'not llm'"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Docs - README + router skill (25 tools) + spec status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** README Phase 2 section + tool count 18->25; router SKILL.md documents 7 new tools; mark design spec status Implemented.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "skills/router/SKILL.md", "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-23-phase-2-orchestration-design.md"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m \"not llm\" -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README Phase 2 section + 25 tools", "router documents 7 new tools", "no stale tool-count assertions remain"]}
```
